title: RDWU – Faculty – 80 Posts
applyMode: Online via HIMS Portal (https://hims.odisha.gov.in/) + Hard copy via Speed Post
shortInfo: The Rama Devi Womens University (RDWU) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 80 Faculty. Candidates with Any Masters Degree, M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-05-2026, and closes on 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through RDWU website, rdwu.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: RDWU Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 80 Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Rama Devi Womens University (RDWU) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 80 Faculty. Candidates with Any Masters Degree, M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-05-2026, and closes on 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through RDWU website, rdwu.ac.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Botany, Business Administration, Chemistry, Commerce, Computer Science, Economics, Education, English, Gender Studies, Hindi, History, Home Science, Journalism & Mass Communication, Life Science, Mathematics, Music, Odia, Philosophy, Physics, Political Science, Psychology, Sanskrit, Sociology, Statistics, Zoology
basic_details.application_mode: Online via HIMS Portal (https://hims.odisha.gov.in/) + Hard copy via Speed Post

age_limit.age_details: Interview (shortlisting: max 15 candidates per post; 1:10 ratio for multiple posts)

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: Pay Level-14 (7th CPC) | Associate Professor: Pay Level-13A (7th CPC) | Assistant Professor: Pay Level-10 (7th CPC)

selection_process: Screening/Scrutiny + Interview (as per UGC Notification 18th July 2018)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online through the HIMS Portal (https://hims.odisha.gov.in/) which will be available from 07.05.2026 onwards. Candidates must complete the application in all respects and upload all necessary supporting documents on or before 10.06.2026. The online application can be filled in multiple sessions. No other format of application or CV should be sent by email or any other means. In addition, a hard copy of the downloaded submitted application along with all relevant documents must be sent only via Speed Post to reach the University on or before 20.06.2026. Courier/ordinary post/hand delivery will not be accepted.
seo_tags: Rama Devi Womens University Faculty Recruitment 2026
